features: ONVIF Profile G, S, and T conformant (confirmed consistently across multiple retailer datasheets)
line crossing, region intrusion, and scene change detection (full analytics suite requires a Speco Blue Series NVR)
digital WDR, backlight compensation, highlight compensation, 3D-DNR
3.5mm audio input jack in addition to built-in mic

frigate.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance is confirmed consistently across multiple independent retailer datasheets for this exact model, which is a strong signal for reliable ONVIF-based discovery and stream setup in Frigate. Exact RTSP URL path was not found in an official Speco source and should be confirmed via ONVIF auto-discovery or the camera's own web UI rather than assumed.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance explicitly and consistently confirmed by the manufacturer/retailers for this model.

blue_iris.notes: Strong ONVIF conformance makes this a likely good fit; not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically. Speco's own recorders are the officially supported pairing (Speco Blue Series NVR).
